title: Services
description: Discover our most popular services, designed to address the most common foot and ankle concerns.

service_1.title: Podiatric and Biomechanical Diagnostics
service_1.hook: Foot pain is not normal, it's a signal.
service_1.description: Gait analysis, load distribution, and pressure point analysis.

service_2.title: Bone Structure and Foot Biomechanics Diagnostics
service_2.hook: Pain in the feet, knees, or back is not a coincidence, but a disruption of the body's biomechanics.
service_2.description: Comprehensive diagnostics with analysis of: bone structure, foot pressure point scanning, position of knee, hip, and shoulder joints. We determine how load is distributed across the body and where the breakdown occurs.

results.0: Accurate identification of the cause of pain and deformations
results.1: A complete picture of the musculoskeletal system's performance
results.2: The basis for manufacturing individual anatomical therapeutic insoles

service_3.title: Custom Orthopedic Insoles
service_3.hook: Universal insoles don't treat—they mask the problem.
service_3.description: Personal correction tailored to your anatomy and gait.

results.0: Pain reduction from the very first days

service_4.title: Custom Silicone Toe Orthoses
service_4.hook: The "bunion" is not just aesthetics; it's a structural foot issue.
service_4.description: Gentle toe position correction and pressure protection.

service_5.title: Pressure Relief for Problem Areas (Corns, Calluses)
service_5.hook: Removing a callus doesn't mean solving the problem.
service_5.description: Eliminating the cause of pressure + skin treatment.

service_6.title: Ingrown Toenail Correction
service_6.hook: Ingrown toenails can be treated without surgery.

service_7.title: Medical Podiatric Foot Care
service_7.hook: Pedicure is aesthetics, podiatry is health.
service_7.description: Medical treatment based on the diagnosis.

service_8.title: Treatment of Cracked Heels
service_8.hook: Cracks are not about dryness; they are about foot overload.

service_9.title: Conservative Treatment of Foot Deformities
service_9.hook: Even at grades 3–4, quality of life can be improved without surgery.
service_9.description: Comprehensive approach: insoles + orthoses + load control.

service_10.title: Ongoing Podiatric Care & Monitoring
service_10.hook: A single procedure doesn't solve a chronic problem.
